lastItems.title: Is it agentic enough? Benchmarking open models on your own tooling
Improving health intelligence in ChatGPT
lastItems.summary: Learn how GPT-5.5 Instant improves ChatGPT’s health and wellness responses with stronger reasoning, better context, clearer communication, and physician-informed evaluations.

lastItems.title: New research shows how AMIE, our medical AI, could help manage health conditions.
lastItems.summary: Research in “Nature” shows our conversational AI system matches primary care physicians in complex disease management.
